mapper.sql: id, dict_type_code, dict_label, dict_value, sort, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_data WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_data SET dict_type_code = #{dictTypeCode}, dict_label = #{dictLabel}, dict_value = #{dictValue}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_dict_data SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_dict_data WHERE dict_type_code = #{dictTypeCode} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_dict_data d WHERE d.dict_type_code = #{dictTypeCode} AND d.status = 1 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.sort ASC, d.id ASC
